announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company has, at its meeting held on October 29, 2014, inter alia, considered and approved the following :  1. In-principle approval to a Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation ('the Scheme') involving:      Transfer of ticketing business division of Travel Corporation (India) Limited ('TCI'), a wholly owned subsidiary of Thomas Cook (India) Limited ('TCIL'), to Thomas Cook Tours Limited ('TCT'); and      Merger of residual TCI into TCIL    The Scheme is subject to requisite consent, approval of the requisite majority of the shareholders, lenders, creditors of both the companies, all the relevant stock exchanges, SEBI, the High Court of Mumbai, and the permission or approval of the Central Government or any other statutory or regulatory authorities, which by law may be necessary for the implementation of the Scheme.    2. Constitution of a restructuring committee, which would finalize and approve the said Scheme, engage valuers for determining the consideration, the share exchange ratio, if any, Merchant Bankers for opining on the fairness of the share exchange ratio, if any and to do all such acts, deeds and things as may be necessary and expedient to implement the Scheme.    3. The Board has also accorded its approval to evaluate demerging the insurance business from Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of TCIL, after its merger with Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited and merging it with TCIL.

announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company at its Adjourned Meeting held on May 28, 2016, inter alia have accorded its consent to the Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation involving segregation of outbound division of SOTC Travel Services Private Ltd ( SOTC ) (earlier known as Kuoni Travel (India) Private Limited), wholly owned subsidiary of TCIL into Sita Travels Private Limited, wholly owned subsidiary of TCIL and amalgamation of SITA Group of Companies, wholly owned subsidiaries of TCIL and residual SOTC (post segration of outbound business) into Travel Corporation (India) Limited, also a wholly owned subsidiary of TCIL). The sanction has been accorded pursuant to its internal Policy on Acquisition / Takeover / Merger by subsidiaries. The Scheme shall be subject to the approval/ sanction of the Hon ble High Court of Bombay and all other regulatory approvals, as may be necessary. Further the Scheme is pertaining to the consolidation of subsidiaries of TCIL and TCIL is not a party to the Scheme.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ICICI Securities Limited ("Manager to the Offer"), has informed the Exchange regarding Open offer for acquisition of up to 23,486,264 equity shares ("Offer") constituting 26% of the Voting Share Capital of Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited (the "Target Company") from the equity shareholders of the Target Company by Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited ("Acquirer") With Thomas Cook (india) Limited and Travel Corporation (India) Limited ("Persons Acting in Concert/PAC").

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding updates on Order of Comptition Commission of India with respect to Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation between Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited ("SHRIL"), Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited ("TCISIL") and Thomas Cook (India) Limited ("TCIL") (together, the Parties).

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding updates on Scheme of Arrangement between Quess Corp Limited and its wholly owned subsidiaries-Magna, Avon and Hofincons.

announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 23, 2018, titled "Board of Thomas Cook (India) Limited approves proposal for corporate restructuring".

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that Intimation received on  December 22, 2016 from Travel Corporation (India) Limited ( TCI ), wholly owned subsidiary of the Company, pertaining to vertical amalgamation under the Companies Ordinance (Chapter 622 of the Laws of Hong Kong) between Travel Circle International Limited (Formerly known as Luxe Asia Travel (China) Limited),wholly owned subsidiary of TCI situated in Hong Kong and Travel Circle International Services Limited (Formerly known as Kuoni Travel (China) Limited), wholly owned subsidiary of Travel Circle International Limited.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that are enclosing herewith intimations received on April 20, 2017 from Travel Corporation (India) Limited ("TCI") and SOTC Travel Services Private Limited (formerly known as Kuoni Travel (India) Private Limited) ("SOTC"), wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company, pertaining to approval granted by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) for the Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation between SOTC Travel Services Private Limited (earlier known as Kuoni Travel (India) Private Limited), Distant Frontiers Tours Private Limited, SITA Beach Resorts Private Limited, SITA Destination Management Private Limited, SITA Holidays (India) Private Limited, SITA Holidays Resorts Private Limited, SITA Incoming (India) Private Limited, SOTC Travel Private Limited (formerly known as SITA TravelsPrivate Limited) and Travel Corporation (India) Limited. Further the Companies have initiated the process for obtaining the written order of NCLT which is yet to be received. The Scheme would be effective from the date the Order is filed with the respective Registrar of Companies by them.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about approval of Composite Scheme of Arrangement by Board of Directors of Sterling Holiday Resorts Limited (Wholly Owned Material Subsidiary of Thomas Cook (India) Limited) under Regulation 30(9) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 20, 2026, titled "Thomas Cook (India) Limited announces the demerger of its Resorts and Resort Management business into Sterling Holiday Resorts Limited".

announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about Reduction of Share Capital.

announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about Composite Scheme of Arrangement.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about Composite Scheme of Arrangement.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that in pursuance of the Order of Hon'ble High Court, Bombay, dated July 2, 2015 sanctioning the Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation between Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited (SHRIL) and Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited (TCISIL) and Thomas Cook (India) Limited and their respective shareholders and creditors (Scheme), that September 1, 2015 has been fixed as the Record Date for the purpose of ascertaining the shareholders of SHRIL who shall be entitled to the shares of TCIL pursuant to the said scheme in ratio of (i) 116 equity shares of Re. 1/- each of the Company for every 100 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each held in SHRIL in consideration of the Demerger of time share and resort business division and undertaking of SHRIL to TCISIL; and(ii) 4 equity shares of Re. 1/- each of the Company for every 100 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each held in SHRIL for Amalgamation of residual business of SHRIL with TCIL and that the effective date of the Scheme is 18th August, 2015.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about execution of business transfer agreement and subsequent sale of the Hotel Business  to the company by Nature Trails Resorts Private Limited ( NTRPL ) a step down wholly owned subsidiary of the company  under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about the execution of business transfer agreement for purchase of the Hotel Business of Nature Trails Resorts Private Limited ( NTRPL ) a step down wholly owned subsidiary of the company, under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that�� the Board of Directors of our company at its meeting held today has unanimously approved the amendments in the Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation between Thomas Cook (India) Limited (��TCIL��), Quess Corp Limited (��QCL��), Travel Corporation (India) Limited (��TCI��), TC Forex Services Limited (formerly known as Tata Capital Forex Limited) (��TCF��), TC Travel Services Limited (formerly known as TC Travel and Services Limited) (��TCTSL��) and SOTC Travel Management Private Limited (formerly known as ��SITA Travels and Tours Private Limited��) (��SOTC TRAVEL��) and their respective shareholders (��the Amended Scheme��) in accordance with the provisions of Section 230 to 232 read with Section 52, 55, and 66 of the Companies Act, 2013

announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a Press Release dated July 14, 2015 titled ''Thomas Cook India receives Bombay High Court approval for merger with Sterling Holiday Resorts'' .

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that the Hon ble High Court of Bombay has, vide its order dated July 02, 2015, sanctioned the composite scheme of arrangement and amalgamation between Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited ("SHRIL"), Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited ("TCISIL") and Thomas Cook India Limited ("TCIL") and their respective shareholders and creditors under sections 391 to 394 of the Companies Act, 1956, and Section 78, read with section 100 to 103 thereto or any corresponding sections of the Companies Act, 2013, as may be applicable ("Scheme").A copy of the order was uploaded on the website of Hon ble Bombay High Court on July 13, 2015.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update on the Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation amongst TC Forex Services Limited and Travel Corporation (India) Limited and TC Travel Services Limited and SOTC Travel Management Private Limited and Thomas Cook (India) Limited and Quess Corp Limited and their respective shareholders.'.

announcements.headline: Press Release (Revised)
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that that there were certain discrepancies in the press release dated February 07, 2014, particularly in the figures. Therefore a company has submitted a copy of Revised Press Release dated February 08, 2014 titled "Thomas Cook (India) Limited & Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited, announce merger".

announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated February 07, 2014, titled "Thomas Cook (India) Limited & Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited, announce merger".

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Sanction order of Scheme of Arrangement for demerger of Identified Business of Manipal Integrated Services Private Limited into Quess Corp Limited by NCLT, Bengaluru Bench.'.

announcements.headline: Allotment of Securities
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors vide resolution dated September 03, 2015 allotted 4,86,57,929 Equity Shares of Re.1/- each of the Company to the shareholders of Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited (SHRIL) pursuant to the Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation between SHRIL, Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited and Thomas Cook (India) Limited and their respective shareholders and creditors (Scheme), approved by Hon'ble High Court of Bombay vide order dated July 02, 2015.

announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company has at its meeting held on February 03, 2016, inter alia has accorded in-principle approval for the merger of SITA, the inbound division of Kuoni Travel (India) Pvt Limited (wholly owned subsidiary of the Company) with, Travel Corporation (India) Limited (also a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company) subject to regulatory approvals and compliance.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that the Hon'ble High Court of Bombay has, vide its order dated July 2, 2015, sanctioned the composite scheme of arrangement and amalgamation between Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Limited ("SHRIL"), Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited ("TCISIL") and Thomas Cook India Limited ("TCIL") and their respective shareholders and creditors under sections 391 to 394 of the Companies Act, 1956, and Section 78, read with section 100 to 103 thereto or any corresponding sections of the Companies Act, 2013, as may be applicable ("Scheme").

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the Proposed Scheme of Amalgamation ("Scheme") between IKYA Human Capital Solutions ("IKYA"), Magna Infotech Ltd ("Magna"), Avon Facility Management Services Limited ("Avon") and Hofincons Infotech & Industrial Services Private Limited("Hofincons").  The Company have been informed by IKYA, a subsidiary of Thomas Cook (India) Limited, that with reference to the above subject, the boards of IKYA, Magna, Avon and Hofincons have considered and approved the Scheme to merge Magna, Avon and Hofincons (collectively know as "Transferor Companies") into IKYA.   The Transferor Companies are wholly owned subsidiary companies of IKYA. IKYA would like to integrate and consolidate its subsidiaries, to streamline its business in India.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has submitted to the Exchange a notice of hearing of Petition of Composite Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation, being dispatched to the Unsecured Creditors/Secured Creditors/Unsecured Debenture Holders of the Company in the prescribed manner,

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about the approval of proposal of purchase by the Company of the Hotel Business of Nature Trails Resorts Private Limited ( NTRPL ) through a slump sale.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ICICI Securities Limited ("Manager to the Offer"), on behalf of Thomas Cook Insurance Services (India) Limited ("Acquirer"), Thomas Cook (India) Limited ("PAC 1") and Travel Corporation (India) Limited ("PAC 2", collectively with PAC 1 referred to as "PAC") has informed this Announcement ("Pre Offer Advertisement") under Regulation 18(7) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations in respect of the open offer to acquire up to 23,486,264 equity shares representing 26% of the voting share capital, being the equity share capital of Sterling Holiday Resorts (India) Ltd ("Target Company") as of the 10th (tenth) working day from closure of tendering period of the Target Company in accordance with the SEBI (SAST) Regulations ("Offer"). The detailed public statement ("DPS") with respect to the aforementioned offer was published on February 14, 2014.
